dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal describes candlestick breakout pattern with upward direction. Entry conditions translated as: (1) price at or above pivot (old high equivalent), (2) ADX > 60 representing steep directional move (trending above 60 degrees), (3) volume confirmation for breakout. Exit condition uses reversal below 20-SMA as reasonable stop for failed breakout. Success rates and average moves from parameters (6.85% avg rise with heavy volume) inform stop_loss_pct. Target regimes set to both bull and bear reversals/continuations as stated. 'AUTHOR_SILENT' exit conditions replaced with technical reversal signal.

source_rule_text: Candlestick breakout pattern: Price vulnerability to reversal or continuation based on market conditions and price action characteristics
